# jamfprotect_action_configuration (List Resource)

Lists Action Configurations in Jamf Protect.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "jamfprotect_action_configuration" "example" {
  provider = "jamfprotect"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name_prefix` (String) Optional name prefix filter applied to listed Action Configurations.
